name: OmopMedicationRequestDrugExposureView
title: MedicationRequest → drug_exposure (flat)
description: Prescription/order stage of the medication lifecycle. One FHIR MedicationRequest maps to one OMOP drug_exposure row. MedicationRequest is the richest of the four FHIR medication-event resources for OMOP purposes because it carries dispense, refill, and supply-duration metadata that the other three lack. Type concept 38000177 (Prescription written).

column.name: drug_exposure_id
column.description: Surrogate key. Hash/sequence/lookup of FHIR resource id. omoponfhir uses IdMapping.getOMOPfromFHIR(); NACHC uses autogen sequence; fhir-to-omop-demo uses FHIR .id directly.

column.name: person_id
column.description: Resolve Patient reference to integer person_id. If unresolvable, omoponfhir throws FHIRException; FhirToCdm skips the record; this project defaults to 0.

column.name: drug_concept_id
column.description: RxNorm (US) or ATC (EU) code mapped to OMOP standard concept via vocabulary lookup. Placeholder: 0 when concept lookup unavailable.

column.name: drug_exposure_start_date
column.description: The date the prescription was authored. NACHC falls back to encounter start date if null. FhirToCdm derives from VisitOccurrence instead.

column.name: drug_exposure_end_date
column.description: If absent, fallback to start date. This project also derives end from dispenseRequest.expectedSupplyDuration only when validityPeriod.end is absent.

column.name: drug_exposure_end_datetime
column.description: Full ISO datetime. Null if no end available.

column.name: stop_reason
column.description: Reason for discontinuation. omoponfhir truncates to 20 chars. Only populated when status = stopped. Most implementations leave null.

column.name: refills
column.description: Number of refills. omoponfhir reads from dispenseRequest as fallback when dosageInstruction is empty. Only applicable to MedicationRequest.

column.name: quantity
column.description: Dose amount per administration. omoponfhir also reads dispenseRequest.quantity.value as fallback. ETL-German computes mean of Range when doseRange is used.

column.name: days_supply
column.description: Days of medication supply. Calculated from expectedSupplyDuration.value with UCUM unit conversion. This project converts h/d/wk/mo/a units. No reference implementation populates this. — transform: convertUcumDuration(value, unit) -- h/d/wk/mo/a to days

column.name: sig
column.description: Free-text dosage instructions. FhirToCdm reads dosageInstruction[0].text. fhir-to-omop-demo uses .note.

column.name: route_concept_id
column.description: Administration route. Requires vocabulary lookup against SNOMED route concepts. This project currently sets null and captures route_source_value only.

column.name: route_source_value
column.description: Raw route code or display text. omoponfhir prefers route.text, falls back to coding[0].display.

column.name: provider_id
column.description: Prescriber. omoponfhir uses recorder instead. This project uses requester.

column.name: visit_occurrence_id
column.description: Resolve Encounter reference. omoponfhir validates that the referenced VisitOccurrence exists in the database.

column.name: drug_source_value
column.description: Best code by vocabulary priority (RxNorm > ATC > NDC > first). omoponfhir uses identifier.value as source value.

column.name: dose_unit_source_value
column.description: Raw dose unit string. omoponfhir prefers .code, falls back to .unit.

where.description: status in {active, completed} AND intent in {order, original-order, reflex-order, filler-order, instance-order}
